mapper.select: select count(id) from auto_info where deleted = 0
select count(id) from auto_info where deleted = 0 and status = #{status}
select count(id) from busi_order where deleted = 0 and month(rental_time) = month(now()) and year(rental_time) = year(now())
select count(id) from busi_violation where deleted = 0 and status = 0
select ifnull(sum(rent_actual), 0) from busi_order where deleted = 0 and month(return_time) = month(now()) and year(return_time) = year(now())
select ifnull(sum(rent_payable), 0) from busi_order where deleted = 0 and month(return_time) = month(now()) and year(return_time) = year(now())
select ifnull(sum(deposit), 0) from busi_order where deleted = 0 and month(return_time) = month(now()) and year(return_time) = year(now())

select date_format(return_time, '%m-%d') day, round(ifnull(sum(rent_actual), 0) / 1000, 1) value from busi_order where deleted = 0 and return_time is not null and date(return_time) >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date(return_time), date_format(return_time, '%m-%d') order by date(return_time)

select a.auto_num plate, t.type_name model, c.name customer, date_format(o.rental_time, '%c-%d') start, '-' end, 30 progress from busi_order o, auto_info a, busi_customer c, busi_rental_type t where o.auto_id = a.id and o.customer_id = c.id and o.type_id = t.id and o.deleted = 0 and a.deleted = 0 and c.deleted = 0 and t.deleted = 0 and o.return_time is null order by o.rental_time desc limit 4
select '违章待处理' title, concat(auto_num, ' ', reason, ' 罚款¥', fine) `desc`, '待处理' tag, 'danger' tone from busi_violation where deleted = 0 and status = 0 order by violation_time desc limit 5
select day(date(rental_time)) days, count(id) rentalNum from busi_order where deleted = 0 and month(rental_time) = month(now()) and year(rental_time) = year(now()) group by 1 order by 1
